title: Greenify
description: Re-textures everything dyed green to look better!
body:
**

Optional [Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone) & Optional [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)** ‎ ![Title/Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afd6a5d198067a31b5e8358023cc0992449947f3.png) **

Greenify is a texture pack that turns everything dyed green from an ugly shade to a good looking shade (check gallery to see!) Utilizing mods like Polytone and Continuity to make sure EVERYTHING dyed green is changed, not just whats possible in normal vanilla texture packs.** ###

RECCOMMENDED MODS: **

Polytone**: Allows entities like sheep, banners, beacons, etc change color. **

Continuity**: Allows blocks to have connected textures (glass). **

KEEP IN MIND YOU DO NOT NEED THESE MODS! Only if you want to have in the pack what they let me do.** ‎ ![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e93a248809168afdb4fed857d79630b8fa3730b8.png) _

if you'd like to use assets from this pack, or anything else I made, let me know about it and please credit the pack somewhere somewhat obvious, like a description or credits area._ **

Made by TeamChar1ie (me)**\ **

Check out my other projects [Here!](https://modrinth.com/user/TChar1ie)**
